 > I've been unable to reproduce this problem.  Are you still experiencing
 > it or was it a local problem?
 
 I tried to reproduce it again and was not able to. I guess close the
 bug. It was a pretty clean jail though, so I'm not sure what I might
 have done.
 
 Thanks for looking into it and apologies for the wasted effort if this
 wasn't real.
